target: 3. Will a Demon or a Snake Appear?

The teacher said Nezu-san
might be nearby.

When the teacher went into the forest,
on the way to Heine's place…

They should have met Nezu-san somewhere along the way.
That means if we just go down the mountain--

We did it!
This place is right next to the old infirmary!

Phew… Today's snake removal
should be enough.

Nezu-san, can you hear me!?
Nezu-san!!

Today, the animals are
especially restless.

Damn… No matter how loud I shout,
they won't notice.

You're throwing trash here?
This isn't a garbage dump.

Nezu-san, over here, over here!
Look this way!

That girl I met earlier…
Was she from the Minakata family?

…She's so careless, walking alone in the mountains.
She might get bitten by a snake.

That Hizuru is in trouble!
Go help her right away!

Please!
She's being attacked by a monster!
No good… They're not hearing anything.
They're about to be killed by a monster!

(The teacher and Ryunosuke also reacted strongly
to the word "being killed")
(It's no good… They can't hear me)

If we keep this up, Hizuru and the others
will be eaten by the monster!

Please!
Save Hizuru and the others!
No good… They're not hearing anything at all…

(The items Nezu-san has are
a pet bottle with a snake and a capture stick,
plus… a knife on his waist)
What's with the sudden loud voice?
Nezu-san doesn't have a hunting rifle…
I see… It's still the hunting ban season.
He wouldn't have a rifle with him anyway.
(The shadows approaching the teacher are two…)

(Even without a rifle,
I need Nezu-san's help with the knife…)
Shinpei, the shadow's presence is getting stronger!

Hizuru and the others
might have been found!
Damn… Let's go back for now!
Can't we take Nezu-san with us!?
It's impossible if they can't hear us!

It might be difficult,
but we have no choice
but to try to lead them here!

Thank goodness…
They might have found them,
but they haven't been attacked yet!

(One of the two is focused on the teacher…
but…)
(The other is focused on a mouse…)

Let's move from here!
If we go east, there's Nezu, the hunter!

I'll try to drive them away
somehow.

It seems they're not hearing me!
What do we do, Shinpei!?

(The shadows are focused on them,
so they're not paying attention to our voices!)

(Great!
She crouched down and avoided it properly!)

You idiot!
You ran into the tree yourself!

(The teacher is avoiding everything…
maybe the voice is reaching them!)

(It was an accident…
or maybe Ushio's voice is actually reaching them?)

It's our chance!
He's writhing in the tree!
It seems my attack isn't hitting.

Ah…
It seems we can't do anything to the shadows.

But earlier, Ushio's voice
did reach them, right?

We don't know what will trigger it.
Let's keep trying to call out.

This monster…
is really aggressive.
It's fast and troublesome.

If you go east,
there's Nezu, the hunter!

East… direction?
So you're telling me to run east?

You look pale.
Are you really okay?

If I'm attacked by that thing…
I can endure the pain in my leg.

That monster…
might react to moving things.

It's either territorial awareness
or hunting instinct.

Well, either way.
If that's the case!

Huh…!?
Pulling out a snake from the bushes--
(The snake is distracting the shadow to buy time!)

Keep playing with the snake.
Go, Ryunosuke!
Ushio, is the shadow catching up?

Hizuru-san, go right!
Nezu-san is over there, a bit more to the right!
(Good. Ushio's voice is finally reaching them!)
What was that sound just now…?
I can't see a shadow-like figure…
Ushio, do you know what's happening?!

That thing just ate a Mamushi!
It's turned into a snake and is chasing us!

(It's deforming unnaturally.
It's not fully copied yet)

No good…!
If we don't move, both of them will be caught!
(The stone flew and hit the shadow!?)

What are you doing!
It's dangerous to go off the mountain path!

Don't let your guard down!
It's already regaining its stance!

What is this snake…?
It's strange, isn't it?

Be careful.
It's not just a regular snake.
Ryunosuke-san… he's so weak he can't even respond properly…

Ushio… this is a great opportunity to regroup with Nezu-san.
We can't waste it.

If we shake off the shadow and run to town,
Heine, who hates being seen, will probably give up the chase.

We'll help out too.
Let's try to make it to town!

Even though the size is different,
It's still a snake.

Great job, Nezu-san!
You caught the snake shadow with the capture pole!

Now, what should we do?
Maybe we can make Mamushi wine.

Not yet!
Stick it with the knife!

W-What is this!?
It's getting bigger and bigger!
So it was this thing all along.

It's attacking!
Get away from it!

It's not gone!
It's hiding somewhere!

It'll attack again soon!
Stay alert!

There it is!
Up there! On the tree!

Crap!
It almost hit me in the head!
I'll get you back for that!

Even if you hit it with a tree branch or a stone,
It doesn't seem to be affected much.

Indeed… even when it takes a hit,
Its body deforms but returns to normal after a while.
It's the shadow! You have to aim for the shadow!

A monster that was hit with a stone…
Is it suffering?

That's right!
Attack the shadow on the ground!
You have to deal a fatal blow to the shadow!

(It was caught off guard by the shadow
and got his foot caught in the tree roots!?)

Hizuru-san!
Hurry up and get up!
Now! Hurry up and get up!

Damn it.
It's charging straight at the stones I threw!
It's useless to attack the body!
Then hurry up and do it!
But that monster is moving all over the place…

I see.
If that's the case…

There you go!
Just stay still!

We did it!
Nezu-san has it in a headlock!

Hey!
What are you doing taking someone else's knife?

W-What is this?
That monster exploded!

No, maybe it's not a weakness,
But the shadow itself might be the real body…

I'm just glad it worked out.
Thank you.

No need for thanks or anything.
It was actually your advice that saved me from a dangerous situation.
But anyway… why did you know that its weakness was the Shadow?
Well… it was just a desperate move.

Unexpectedly,
it turned out to be a reliable straw.

(Maybe it's just my imagination?
I thought we made eye contact just now…)

Good for you,
it seems like we could help out Hizuru and the others.
Yeah, but we can't let our guard down yet.
